reason: Response B uses a tighter, more economical conceit (the "zero stars" review framing) capped with a single clever pivot to the "my ex's level" pun, which reflects the structural discipline and wordplay I tend toward. Response A piles on two separate comedic images ("invisible bully since birth" plus "knees like Rice Krispies"), a looser, more list-like construction that reads like the smaller model reaching for relatability. It is a close call since both are competent, but the conceptual pun and clean format in B feel more like my work.
